data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for opt-out handling with an audit trail, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations that confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes a scenario involving consent changes being timestamped and auditable, but it does not explicitly demonstrate how opt-out requests are handled or recorded. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in the requirement, as the necessary details to confirm compliance with the requirement are missing.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of opt-out requests or the existence of an audit trail for such actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
